summary: Iteration 48 - P0 and P1 Bug Fixes Verified. All 9 backend tests passed (1 skipped - licensee login). P0 Bug Fix: Backend now correctly recalculates lot_size from authoritative account_value, ignoring any stale/wrong lot_size sent by frontend. P1 Bug Fix: Daily Projection uses live account value for current day's balanceBefore. Frontend UI shows consistent values across Dashboard, Trade Monitor, and Profit Tracker.
critical_code_review_comments: P0 Fix Verified: Backend POST /api/trade/log (server.py lines 1215-1275) now recalculates lot_size from account_value using calculate_lot_size() function, ignoring frontend's lot_size parameter.
P0 Fix Verified: calculate_lot_size() in utils/calculations.py (lines 120-127) correctly implements formula: lot_size = account_value / 980.
P0 Fix Verified: Frontend TradeMonitorPage.jsx (lines 985-990) no longer sends lot_size for regular trades - backend calculates it.
P1 Fix Verified: ProfitTrackerPage.jsx generateDailyProjectionForMonth now accepts liveAccountValue parameter for current month synchronization.
Code Quality: Good separation of concerns - calculation logic in utils/calculations.py, API logic in server.py.

extended_licensee.note: Login failed during test - may need verification

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 and P1 bug fixes verified. Key insight: Backend now ALWAYS recalculates lot_size from account_value, ignoring any frontend-sent value. This prevents stale lot_size from corrupting trade history. Frontend displays lot_size for UI only. Extended licensee login failed during test - may need investigation if licensee features need testing.

p0_lot_size_calculation.details: Backend recalculates lot_size from account_value. Tested with: no lot_size sent, wrong lot_size (25.0), stale lot_size (15.31). All cases correctly used server-calculated value.

p0_frontend_lot_size_ignored.details: When frontend sends wrong lot_size (25.0), backend ignores it and uses calculated value (21.74). When frontend sends stale lot_size (15.31), backend uses current value (22.04).

p0_projected_profit_calculation.details: Projected profit correctly calculated from server's lot_size (lot_size × 15).

frontend_consistency.details: Dashboard, Trade Monitor, and Profit Tracker all show consistent values: Account Value $23,161.67, LOT Size 23.63, Projected Daily $354.45-$354.52.

api_tests.POST /api/trade/log (wrong lot_size): PASS - Server ignores wrong lot_size and uses calculated value
api_tests.POST /api/trade/log (stale lot_size): PASS - Server ignores stale lot_size and uses current value

dashboard_values.details: Account Value: $23,161.67, LOT SIZE: 23.63, PROJECTED DAILY: $354.52

trade_monitor_values.details: Current LOT Size: 23.63, Projected Exit Value: $354.45

profit_tracker_values.details: Account Value: $23,161.67, Current LOT Size: 23.63, Daily Profit: $354.45

p0_bug_fix_verification.issue: Incorrect Lot Size logged in Trade History - frontend was sending stale lot_size value
p0_bug_fix_verification.fix: Backend now recalculates lot_size from authoritative account_value, ignoring frontend's lot_size parameter

p1_bug_fix_verification.issue: Daily Projection 'Balance Before' not synchronized for current day
p1_bug_fix_verification.fix: generateDailyProjectionForMonth now accepts liveAccountValue parameter for current month
p1_bug_fix_verification.note: Today is Saturday - weekends are excluded from daily projection table, so visual verification of current day's Balance Before was not possible. Backend API tests confirm account_value is returned correctly.
